data.body: DOC GAP fixed (user-caught): S5 module move left docs/architecture.md:169 stale — described ACLI as living at rebar_reconciler/acli.py imported via 'from rebar_reconciler import acli'. My S5 structural gate + subagent covered code + test path refs but MISSED hand-written architecture-doc prose. Fixed to rebar_reconciler/adapters/jira/acli.py + 'from rebar_reconciler.adapters.jira import acli' (ADR 0035 §c). Comprehensive sweep of docs/+AGENTS+CONTRIBUTING+README+_guides (excl. historical experiment JSONL run-logs): architecture.md was the ONLY stale authoritative-doc ref. Amended into S5 (f72a8d7c3f), re-pushed change 905 (patchset only). No filed bug ticket matched (4 open bugs: 4636/5e94/620b/8559, none about this doc drift) — treated as inline defect in in-flight S5, same as the earlier _recon by-path miss.
